title: 7T MRI Protocol for response to Respiratory-gated Auricular Vagal Afferent Nerve Stimulation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2qo6r","text":"This is the 7T MRI protocol for a study of the subject to Respiratory-gated Auricular Vagal Afferent Nerve Stimulation in  the area of the auricular concha.
